title: How did Kaji get Adam
wikitext:
[]: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by DiscoUkulele » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:03 pm Hey, I've tried looking to see if this has been addressed, but I couldn't find any threads or information on the wiki. Where was Adam before Kaji obtained her/him/it? I've always assumed SEELE had Adam, but then I don't understand how Kaji could have possibly stolen it and smuggled it into Japan. It seems like, if SEELE had Adam, they wouldn't let it out of their grasp that easily, and they would've noticed it was missing. Are there multiple clones of the Adam embryo? That's the only way I can make it make sense.

[]: Re: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:13 pm DiscoUkulele wrote: Where was Adam before Kaji obtained her/him/it?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:38 pm Perhaps there is more than one, and SEELE had clones of them because if they had only one and it got destroyed, all of SEELE's plans would have gone down the tube. I guess they made more than one as a backup. The more there were, the easier it would have been for Kaji to steal one without it being noticed, so there could have been a large number of Adam embryos.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Aug 28, 2009 7:22 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Perhaps there is more than one, and SEELE had clones of them because if they had only one and it got destroyed, all of SEELE's plans would have gone down the tube. I guess they made more than one as a backup. The more there were, the easier it would have been for Kaji to steal one without it being noticed, so there could have been a large number of Adam embryos.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Aug 28, 2009 8:51 pm I never though of this, and, as a result, am going into serious fan wank territory. So we know Evas are clones of Adam, therefore, we can assume that that Adam sample acts as a sort of template and all the Evas are grown from it. Kaji could have grown and Eva embryo and swapped it for the real thing . . . somehow. I think the 'multiple copies' thing is good, too, but I don't follow it completely. There must be something special about the original, which is why Gendo needed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:37 pm MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I think the 'multiple copies' thing is good, too, but I don't follow it completely. There must be something special about the original, which is why Gendo needed it.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:57 pm Sammaeloo wrote: What if the one Gendo got wasn't the original? Maybe they are all capable of causing 3rd Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:09 pm ^ I wonder what's so special about the one Kaji brings to Gendo though? Either its the original or it has some special properties, like if it was engineered to be able to fuse with someone without going all explodie on them like 2nd Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Aug 29, 2009 3:48 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: There must be something special about the original, which is why Gendo needed it.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sat Aug 29, 2009 4:24 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I just don't buy into the thinking that Seele keeps a bunch of infant gods frozen in plastic wrap, it really doesn't make much sense to me. Anyone could get ahold of one and cause the apocalypse.

[]: Re: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Aug 29, 2009 1:15 pm DiscoUkulele wrote: Hey, I've tried looking to see if this has been addressed, but I couldn't find any threads or information on the wiki. Where was Adam before Kaji obtained her/him/it? I've always assumed SEELE had Adam, but then I don't understand how Kaji could have possibly stolen it and smuggled it into Japan. It seems like, if SEELE had Adam, they wouldn't let it out of their grasp that easily, and they would've noticed it was missing. Are there multiple clones of the Adam embryo? That's the only way I can make it make sense.

[]: Re: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by ath » Sat Aug 29, 2009 2:10 pm Allemann wrote: Probably in a similar manner he freed Fuyutsuki.

[]: Re: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Aug 29, 2009 3:26 pm ath wrote: Allemann wrote: Probably in a similar manner he freed Fuyutsuki.

[]: Re: How did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by ath » Sat Aug 29, 2009 3:40 pm Shin-seiki wrote: This has been analyzed here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=119034#119034 and following posts

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Aug 30, 2009 5:58 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Aug 30, 2009 8:46 pm Lucretius wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon Aug 31, 2009 11:38 am Kaji managed to get his hands on adam because he's the second coming of james freakin' bond. what Kaji wants, Kaji gets ;) (seriously, though, i thought at that point Kaji's status as a triple agent hadn't been revealed yet? so he wouldn't have been suspect, not really. although, considering that this is adam we're talking about, you'd think SEELE would up their security by a few notches around the stupid embryo). as far as why gendo needed adam and not just a copy, my guess is that he just thought it was a safer bet. SEELE had no problem with initiating 3I with the evas-- they had the eva MP series after all, so plenty of "adam" bits to go around, and they only had to make sure unit 01 wasn't destroyed during the angel attacks. gendo, on the other hand, did not have the eva series to fall back on, and he always thought of the other evas as "disposable" anyway. in his mind, two steps towards instrumentality: 1. defeat the 17 angels. this is paramount, because if one of the angels succeeds, instrumentality goes bye-bye and so does yui. so even if he has to trash every single eva he has available, that's what he'll have to do. 2. use Rei/lilith and adam to initiate instrumentality. he had Rei, lilith and adam, so no need for evas anywhere, only unit 01 because... well, it's yui. duh. so basically, that's why he decided to go with adam-- so he could use the other evas as cannon fodder without a second thought. not to mention adam was already reduced to an embryo so it was ideal travel size!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 31, 2009 1:44 pm Legendary wrote: Lucretius wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 31, 2009 1:51 pm Well Kaji being the Japanese answer to james bond, I'd say he stole him. Possably by banging every attractive woman under Seele's employ until he got access.

Article: How did Kaji get Adam
, i thought at that point Kaji's status as a triple agent hadn't been revealed yet? so he wouldn't have been suspect, not really. although, considering that this is adam we're talking about, you'd think SEELE would up their security by a few notches around the stupid embryo). as far as why gendo needed adam and not just a copy, my guess is that he just thought it was a safer bet. SEELE had no problem with initiating 3I with the evas-- they had the eva MP series after all, so plenty of "adam" bits to go around, and they only had to make sure unit 01 wasn't destroyed during the angel attacks. gendo, on the other hand, did not have the eva series to fall back on, and he always thought of the other evas as "disposable" anyway. in his mind, two steps towards instrumentality: 1. defeat the 17 angels. this is paramount, because if one of the angels succeeds, instrumentality goes bye-bye and so does yui. so even if he has to trash every single eva he has available, that's what he'll have to do. 2. use Rei/lilith and adam to initiate instrumentality. he had Rei, lilith and adam, so no need for evas anywhere, only unit 01 because... well, it's yui. duh. so basically, that's why he decided to go with adam-- so he could use the other evas as cannon fodder without a second thought. not to mention adam was already reduced to an embryo so it was ideal travel size!
